Cutout Tip · Oak Park Construction
RED FLAGS IN YOUR CONTRACTOR CONTRACT
5 signs the contract you're about to sign is protecting THEM, not you.
SWIPE →
Oak Park · CBC1263425
The Risk
1 in 3
Oak Park homeowners report disputes linked to vague contract language
What you are seeing here: the share of homeowners who hit contract trouble — most could have avoided it.
SWIPE →
Oak Park · CBC1263425
What To Know
From a recent OPC build
01
NO PAYMENT SCHEDULE
Milestone payments protect you. Lump sums don't.
02
NO LIEN WAIVER CLAUSE
Without it, subcontractors can lien your home.
03
OPEN-ENDED TIMELINE
No completion date = zero accountability.
SWIPE →
Oak Park · CBC1263425
Pro Tip
► The Pro Move
RED FLAG
Contract doesn't list state license number = not a licensed contractor. Walk away.
SWIPE →
Oak Park · CBC1263425
Sources
WHERE THIS
COMES FROM.
01National Roofing Contractors Assoc. — 2024 Cost Study
02Oak Park Building Dept — Code Section R905
SAVE THIS.
@oakparkconstruction LIC · CBC1263425
